comingSoon.eyebrow: a small skin studio · kitsilano, vancouver
comingSoon.title: *coming* soon.
comingSoon.sub: we're opening the doors shortly. if you have the password, step inside.

hero.title:
your skin,
*considered.*
hero.sub: a small skin studio on west broadway. each visit begins with a slow read of your skin and ends with a plan that fits your week, your budget, and your patience.

meta.dd: face at a time, by appointment

philosophy.title:
slow skin care.
*honest* results.
philosophy.lede: we don't sell quick fixes. each appointment is a full hour at minimum, set aside for one person at a time. the work is unhurried, the conversation is private, and the products are chosen for what your skin actually needs — not what we have in stock.

triad.title: *read*
triad.body: every first visit begins with a careful skin reading — under good light, without a clock running. we ask about your routine, your history, and what brought you in.

triad.title: *treat*
triad.body: a treatment chosen for today's skin, not last month's plan. cleanse, exfoliation, modalities matched to your needs, and a soft lymphatic finish.

triad.title: *tend*
triad.body: you leave with a written plan and a small kit of samples. nothing is upsold. if you don't need a serum, we won't sell you a serum.

studioSplit.title: a single room. *one face* at a time.
studioSplit.body_p1_before_link: mei skin is a one-practitioner boutique built around the belief that good skin care is unhurried. set inside
studioSplit.body_p1_after_link: on west broadway, there's a single treatment room, a single appointment slot per hour, and a single person caring for your skin from start to finish.
studioSplit.body_p2: we work with plant-based and pharmaceutical-grade actives — no marketing buzzwords, no surprise add-ons, no upselling at the front desk. the prices on the menu are the prices you pay.
studioSplit.frame_label: a single room, soft window light

services.title: the menu.
services.note: the prices below are the prices you pay — no add-ons at the desk.

items.name: signature facial
items.description: a full skin reading, double cleanse, custom exfoliation, masque, lymphatic massage, and a tailored finish. the visit to start with.

items.name: deep cleanse
items.description: for congestion, breakouts, and texture. enzyme exfoliation, extractions handled with care, blue-light, and a calming masque.

items.name: microcurrent lift
items.description: low-level electrical current that re-educates facial muscles. immediate lift in the cheekbone and jaw, cumulative over a series.

items.name: chemical peel
items.description: medical-grade aha/bha or jessner peels for tone, texture, and pigmentation. depth chosen with you after a thorough consult.

items.name: led light therapy
items.description: red light for repair and inflammation, blue light for breakouts, near-infrared for deeper recovery. ideal as a single-session add-on.

items.name: microneedling
items.description: collagen induction therapy for fine lines, acne scarring, and overall skin density. numbing, a precise pen depth, and gentle aftercare.

services.footnote: full menu including brow shaping, lash tinting, and body services available on request. members receive priority booking and pricing.

atmosphere.title: an hour that's *actually* yours.
atmosphere.body: no rotating staff, no shared waiting room, no other faces in the building during your treatment. just one practitioner, one room, and the time to do the work properly.

items.quote: i'd been to four other facialists this year before i found mei. the first visit changed how i think about my skin.
items.name: philip

items.quote: my skin barrier was wrecked from over-exfoliating. she fixed in three visits what i'd been chasing for two years.
items.name: marcus

items.quote: i came in for a peel. she talked me out of it and recommended led + a different home routine instead. that kind of honesty is rare.
items.name: rosa

items.quote: microcurrent + her hands. i'm forty-one and people keep asking what i've done. i tell them.
items.name: jun

items.quote: i've been a member for two years. my skin has never looked more like itself.
items.name: elena

items.quote: my partner gifted me a series for our anniversary. now we both go.
items.name: davis

items.quote: the consultation alone is worth the price of admission. i took notes.
items.name: priya

items.quote: i drive in from the north shore for every appointment. there's nowhere else in town i'd rather sit on a table.
items.name: theo
the *studio*

newsletter.title: a quiet *note,* now and then.
newsletter.body: openings, new services, and the occasional skin care thought from mei. once a month, never more. unsubscribe whenever — we won't be offended.
